description: Justworks provides payroll, HR, benefits, and compliance software and services for small businesses, including PEO, EOR, and standalone payroll offerings. Its platform also includes customer-facing integrations with accounting, hiring, finance, and IT tools.
summary: Justworks publicly references one developer integration surface: a Partner API for deeper partner integrations, but no public API docs, spec, endpoint, auth method, GraphQL API, MCP server, or CLI were found on justworks.com.
